channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-19 to 2026-07-25
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 13:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 8 kt NW, water 71°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 5 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.9 sec); wind direction off (N). Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 4.7 sec, wind 9 kt SSE, water 71°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (4.7 sec); wind direction off (SSE). Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.9 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 9 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.9 ft); period too short (5.3 sec). Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 7 kt WNW, water 69°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft). Fri 2026-07-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.9 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 7.5 sec, wind 6 kt W, water 69°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 13:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 8 kt NW, water 71°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 5.9 sec, wind 5 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.9 sec); wind direction off (N).
  • Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 4.7 sec, wind 9 kt SSE, water 71°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (4.7 sec); wind direction off (SSE).
  • Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.9 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 9 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.9 ft); period too short (5.3 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.2 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 7 kt WNW, water 69°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.2 ft).
  • Fri 2026-07-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.3 ft @ 6.9 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 68°F. Low tide: 09:53, 22:48. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-25: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 7.5 sec, wind 6 kt W, water 69°F. Low tide: 10:42, 23:36. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft).
